title: Mama returns — confusion deepens
prompt: Wide shot of @backyard-grill-area, sunny afternoon. @Papa already on the LEFT at the grill wearing @papas-apron, just finished setting up his SECOND round of fresh patties on the grates, light sizzle and smoke. @Mama already standing on the RIGHT side stepping out from the patio direction, drying her hands on a kitchen towel, hair pulled back, casual confused expression. She stops, looks at the brand-new patties cooking, looks at Papa, looks back at the patties. Mama (squinting, totally puzzled): "...wait. Weren't you JUST out here? Cooking? Like five minutes ago?" Papa pauses mid-flip, looks at her with an utterly lost, surrendering shrug, both palms open. Papa (helplessly, voice cracking a little): "I... I think so? I genuinely don't know anymore. I think I dreamed it. The doctor warned me dad-brain peaks at thirty-eight." Mama tilts her head one second, hand pausing on the towel. Mama (suspicious, slow): "...you didn't. Did you?" Papa shrugs and just slowly flips a patty.
